name: datasource_processing_workflow
description: Workflow for processing datasource entities by setting creation timestamp, unique identifier, and scheduling asynchronous logging.

transitions.name: set_creation_timestamp
transitions.description: Set the creation timestamp if not provided.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity's creation timestamp has been set.

transitions.name: set_unique_identifier
transitions.description: Set a unique identifier for the entity.
transitions.start_state_description: Entity's creation timestamp has been set.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity's unique identifier has been set.

externalized_processors.name: process_set_unique_identifier
externalized_processors.description: Process to set a unique identifier.

transitions.name: schedule_logging_task
transitions.description: Schedule the asynchronous logging of the entity creation.
transitions.start_state_description: Entity's unique identifier has been set.
transitions.end_state_description: Entity's asynchronous logging task has been scheduled.
